title: MA2H Acknowledgment / Receipt (v0.4)
description: A one-shot, terminal receipt (spec §14): the receiving party confirms it got the other party's message/answer, optionally with a short note. Cross-cutting — applied to a human->agent directive (§13) and an agent->human ask/task response (§6). The Hub produces it and attests `by`; a pushed ack is signed per §14.4.

ma2h_version.description: The ack primitive is a v0.4 feature; the minor MUST be >= 4.

in_reply_to.description: The acknowledged id: a directive `id` (§13.1) or an ask/task message `id` (§6).

by.description: Hub-attested acking party (never request-supplied). `agent:<id>` in v0.4's two applications; direction-agnostic.

note.description: Optional short, human-readable note. UNTRUSTED agent->human text — the Hub sanitizes it to the §9.6 no-raw-HTML profile before rendering.

resolution_id.description: For an ask/task ack: the `resolution_id` of the Response being acknowledged (disambiguates which resolution).
